archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) combined with 'Gamified Developer Terminal' accents. Designed strictly for Chrome Side Panel (max-width: 400px).

typography.anti_pattern_check: Inter is completely banned. Avoid centering all text.
typography.import_instruction: Add Google Fonts links for Outfit, Unbounded, JetBrains Mono, and Manrope in public/index.html or import via CSS.

spacing_and_layout.app_container: flex flex-col w-full h-screen overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden bg-[#09090B] text-white
spacing_and_layout.radius_system: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements/buttons
spacing_and_layout.layout_strategy: Mobile-first stack. Avoid multi-column grids unless it is 2 columns for very small metric widgets (grid-cols-2).

micro_themes.tactile_buttons: Gamified 'push' effect. Base class: `bg-brand_action text-white font-bold rounded-xl border-b-4 border-blue-800 active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all`.
micro_themes.bento_cards: Flat background with sharp, high-contrast borders: `bg-[#141414] border-2 border-white/10`.
micro_themes.glass_headers: For sticky elements (nav/header/pinned leaderboard): `bg-[#09090B]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10`.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use Lucide icons at large sizes (w-6 h-6 minimum) with heavy stroke-width (2.5 or 3) for gamified visual weight. E.g., <Flame /> for Streaks colored in #FF5C00.
icons_and_assets.media_note: No external AI images generated due to API limits. Rely entirely on typography (Unbounded), CSS borders, and Lucide/Phosphor icons for visual flair.

landmarks.name: Login Hero
landmarks.description: Full height layout centered. Giant 'RepUp' text in Unbounded font. A large Lucide <Github> icon. A massive tactile button 'Connect with GitHub'. Minimal noise/grain background.

landmarks.name: Dashboard Home
landmarks.description: Sticky top bar showing Level (Electric Lime) and Streak (Flame Orange). Below, a 2-column bento grid for quick stats, followed by the daily quests stack.

landmarks.name: Quests List
landmarks.description: Chunky list items. Uncompleted: bright border. Completed: dim opacity (50%), CSS line-through on text, and checkmark bounces in. Avoid generic thin checklists.

landmarks.name: Code Challenge View
landmarks.description: Embedded Monaco editor. Top header shows challenge objective (e.g., 'Fix the array sorting'). Editor takes up ~60vh. Bottom sticky 'Submit & Run' tactile button with safe area padding.

landmarks.name: Leaderboard
landmarks.description: Vertical ranking list showing GitHub avatars (rounded-full) and XP. Top 3 have glowing borders (Gold, Silver, Bronze). Current User's rank is pinned to the absolute bottom via a sticky glassmorphism bar.

landmarks.name: Level-Up Celebration
landmarks.description: Absolute full-screen overlay (z-50) triggered on XP threshold. Black/90 backdrop blur. Giant glowing level number in center (text-8xl in Unbounded), scaling up (framer-motion). 'Continue' button.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text. Use vibrant colors (Orange/Lime) for borders, progress bars, and icons, not body text.
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the level-up celebration.

component_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Do not use default Shadcn Card or Button if they look too generic/Vercel-like. Apply the 'tactile_buttons' and 'bento_cards' micro-themes to Shadcn primitives.
component_instructions.editor: Use @monaco-editor/react. Set theme to 'vs-dark'. Ensure its container has `overflow: hidden` and a fixed height to prevent side-panel scroll breakage.
